validation.command: runtime sample query smoke via ChatAnswerer.from_settings

summary.current_judgment: Chat runtime grounding is recovered for the reproduced failure mode. Retrieval was already finding the right sections; the packet now stops throwing away grounded runtime/ops answers just because the model omitted inline citations.

failure_modes_closed: Runtime and ops answers with multiple grounded hits were downgraded to `no_answer` when the LLM omitted inline citations.
Duplicate hits from the same RBAC section were being discarded instead of converted into a grounded fallback answer.
known_open_risks: The active official pack still contains 29 approved books; wider coverage requires a separate runtime pack decision rather than an answerer-only patch.
Reranker warmup still triggers an unauthenticated Hugging Face warning in local smoke runs.
owner_decisions: Runtime and ops answers now preserve grounded output when multiple hits already exist by injecting fallback inline citations instead of returning a false missing-data message.
notes: The dominant user-visible failure was in answer finalization, not in corpus construction.
A separate product decision is still needed if the active official runtime should expand from the 29-book source-first pack to the 113-book HTML fallback catalog.
